title: Greek Yogurt Whey Protein Mug Cake
description: A quick single-serving mug cake using whey protein and Greek yogurt for moisture, avoiding the dry, rubbery texture typical of protein-powder-only mug cakes.
instructions: In a microwave-safe mug, add 1 scoop (31g) whey protein powder.
Add 1/4 cup (60g) 0% plain Greek yogurt and 1 large egg, then whisk together until smooth with no dry pockets.
Stir in 1/4 tsp baking powder and 1 tbsp (15ml) water until the batter is smooth and pourable.
If you want more sweetness, stir in 1 tsp maple syrup.
Microwave on high in 30-second bursts, checking after each one, until the center is just set but still looks slightly moist - usually 75-90 seconds total. Stop before it looks fully dry on top.
Let it rest for 1 minute before eating - it firms up as it cools, and pulling it early prevents the dry, rubbery texture.
notes: Macros calculated using a standard whey concentrate (130 cal / 24g protein / 4g carb / 1.5g fat per 31g scoop) - adjust to match your specific brand. Adding maple syrup brings it to roughly 254 cal / 36g protein / 11g carb / 6g fat. Protein-to-calorie ratio is excellent here - about 15g per 100 cal.
